label: Save generation to project
description: Queue this row's generation (image/video/text) to be saved under uploads/{projectId}/generations/ (or another subfolder you set). Click Save pending generations in the Library panel. Use variableName for the output (e.g. generatedImage, combinedVideo).

formSchema.label: Run only if (row variable; skip when empty/falsy)
Variable containing generation (data/blob URL, e.g. generatedImage or combinedVideo)
Project ID (variable or literal)
formSchema.placeholder: {{projectId}} or leave empty for selected project

formSchema.label: Default project ID (optional)
formSchema.hint: Used when row has no projectId / _cfsProjectId from loadProjectFile.

formSchema.label: Subfolder under uploads/{projectId}
formSchema.hint: e.g. generations, videos — created under uploads/<id>/.
